mapper.insert: INSERT INTO members (email, password_hash, name, phone) VALUES (#{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{name}, #{phone})
mapper.select: SELECT member_id, email, password_hash, name, phone, created_at, updated_at FROM members WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT member_id, email, password_hash, name, phone, created_at, updated_at FROM members WHERE email = #{email}

SELECT member_id, email, password_hash, name, phone, created_at, updated_at FROM members WHERE email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY member_id ASC LIMIT 20
